narrative:
Miamisburg 4-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 747 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
